title: cmdb26's QoL Implementations
description: Adds things that should be in the game.
body:
This mod will enhance your gameplay experience by adding a lot of balanced items that stick to the style of minecraft. Currently adds:

- Ruby and Ruby Gear
- Emerald Gear
- Nether Star Gear
- Wolf Armor
- Netherite Horse Armor
- New food items

There will be more things coming soon! I will also add fun **secret** things into the mod eventually.

Download this mod if you want the most accurate form of these old or new concepts that were scrapped or only in new versions!
